task_completion.description: Verify that the scconfig (SeisComP Configuration) application is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The scconfig application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the scautopick module is selected for configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the scconfig window, 'scautopick' is highlighted or selected in the module list or navigation tree.

task_completion.description: Verify that the waveform filter is set to BW(4,4,20).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'filter' parameter field in the scautopick configuration shows the exact value 'BW(4,4,20)'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the STA/LTA trigger-on threshold is set to 3.5.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'trigOn' parameter field (typically under thresholds) shows the value '3.5'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the STA/LTA trigger-off threshold is set to 1.5.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'trigOff' parameter field (typically under thresholds) shows the value '1.5'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the AIC picker minimum SNR is set to 2.0.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'minSNR' parameter field (typically under picker -> AIC) shows the value '2.0'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the updated configuration is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' action is visible, such as clicking a 'Save' button, a floppy disk icon, selecting 'Save' from a menu, or a confirmation message indicating the configuration was saved.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the scconfig GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The parameter changes are made within the scconfig graphical interface, not by editing text files in a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual scconfig application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The window shows the standard SeisComP scconfig interface, not a mock-up, browser, or unrelated application.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not simply paste the task description into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editor open just displaying the required parameters as a shortcut.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target module: scautopick. Required parameters: filter = BW(4,4,20), thresholds.trigOn = 3.5, thresholds.trigOff = 1.5, picker.AIC.minSNR = 2.0. Application: scconfig.
